The Challenge

PROTECTING TURBINE
PERFORMANCE

Wind turbine blades endure constant assault from rain, dust, and airborne particles. Over time, this wears down the leading edge — the critical front surface that determines aerodynamic efficiency.

Left untreated, erosion accelerates. Surface damage deepens. Turbulence increases. Energy production falls while structural risk climbs — until the only option is costly emergency repair.

5% annual energy
production loss
from erosion
Annual Energy Production — Erosion Impact
Clean blade — full efficiency
100%
Mild erosion — moderate loss
~97%
Severe erosion — unchecked damage
~95%

Aerones robotic repair restores blades to clean condition faster and more consistently than any manual method — preventing cascading losses across your entire fleet.

ADVANTAGES

Process

HOW IT WORKS

01
Site Assessment
We evaluate turbine location, climate, blade type, and operating conditions to design the optimal repair and coating plan.
02
Robotic Deployment
Our system is deployed to the turbine. Automated scanning identifies and maps all damage zones precisely.
03
Precision Repair
Advanced robotic systems restore the leading edge with consistent quality — no variance, no human error.
04
Protective Coating
Site-specific ice-phobic or erosion-resistant coatings are applied, locking in long-term protection.
